recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
recommendations.overview: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

recommendations.title: Poison Ivy 2: Lily
recommendations.overview: A young and naive college art student becomes obsessed with assuming the identity and personality of a departed coed who used to live in her room, and in so doing causes complications that result in two men, a student and her art professor, lusting a

recommendations.title: To the Bone
recommendations.overview: A young woman dealing with anorexia meets an unconventional doctor who challenges her to face her condition and embrace life.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: Following the events of Captain America: Civil War, Peter Parker, with the help of his mentor Tony Stark, tries to balance his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens, New York City, with fighting crime as his superhero alter ego Spider-Man

recommendations.title: Shithouse
recommendations.overview: Lonely college freshman Alex has closed himself off from his peers, who all appear to have this whole "college thing" figured out. But everything changes one night when Alex takes a leap and attends a party at Shithouse - a legendary party fraternity

recommendations.title: Life Itself
recommendations.overview: As a young New York couple goes from college romance to marriage and the birth of their first child, the unexpected twists of their journey create reverberations that echo over continents and through lifetimes.

recommendations.title: Materialists
recommendations.overview: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

recommendations.title: Falcon Lake
recommendations.overview: A shy teenager on a summer vacation experiences the joy and pain of young adulthood when he forges an unlikely bond with an older girl.

recommendations.title: Loser
recommendations.overview: On a university scholarship, a good natured student from the midwest gets a crash course in city life while dealing with three evil roommates. He befriends a virtually homeless college student whom he falls for, but she's dating a nasty professor.
